name: Derek Schmidt
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $104,414 for Derek Schmidt in U.S. House, KS-02. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
